name: Sparinvest INDEX Global Aktier Min. Risiko Akk. KL
summary: Sparinvest INDEX Global Aktier Min. Risiko Akk. KL is an investment fund that aims to track global equity market performance while minimizing risk. The fund employs a low-volatility strategy, selecting stocks that exhibit lower price fluctuations. Sparinvest manages the fund, which is based in Denmark.
